scripts.lint: bun --cwd backend run lint && bun --cwd frontend run lint
scripts.format:check: bun --cwd backend run format:check && bun --cwd frontend run format:check
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd backend run typecheck && bun --cwd frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: bun --cwd backend run test && bun --cwd frontend run test
scripts.knip: bun --cwd backend run knip && bun --cwd frontend run knip

{**/*.{env*,pem,key},**/*credentials*.js: node -e "console.error('[FATAL] Sensitive files or AI footprints detected:', process.argv.slice(1)); process.exit(1);"
